description:
Operating Area: Croatia

Lagoon 55 “AGENDA 55” – A Luxurious Catamaran with a Deeper Meaning
Discover the Art of Organized Luxury – Agenda 55, Where Every Journey is Purposeful.

The Lagoon 55 “Agenda 55” is a stunning crewed catamaran designed for those who value the finer things in life. Every detail has been meticulously crafted to deliver unparalleled comfort and style, ensuring an unforgettable journey at sea.

The open-plan saloon, with its chic design and panoramic windows, creates a bright and airy atmosphere, ideal for entertaining or unwinding with family and friends. Step outside to the expansive flybridge, featuring a sunbathing area, teak-decked cockpit, and shaded dining space. A sun awning on the forward flybridge adds extra comfort, providing a perfect spot to enjoy stunning sea views while staying cool.

Packed with an impressive array of water toys—including Williams SportJet 395 (100 HP jet power), Seabobs, an air e-foil, stand-up paddleboards, water skis, wakeboards, a donut, a banana, fishing gear, and snorkeling equipment—Agenda 55 ensures endless fun on the water. Whether you’re carving waves, exploring underwater treasures, or reeling in the catch of the day, there’s an adventure for everyone.

The onboard entertainment doesn’t stop there. Agenda 55 is equipped with a karaoke set to bring out your inner star and a variety of board games to create cherished moments with family and friends. These thoughtful additions ensure the fun continues long after the sun sets. 
For sailing enthusiasts, the addition of a Code 0 sail enhances performance, offering a smoother, more exhilarating experience as you embrace the thrill of the open sea.
 
Whether you’re spending the day enjoying water sports, relaxing under the sun, singing your favorite tunes, working seamlessly with Starlink internet, or sharing laughs over games in the saloon, Agenda 55 is equipped to meet every need.

The name “Agenda 55” carries profound significance: Age Non-Disclosure. This reflects the yacht’s timeless design and enduring appeal, where its remarkable quality and features remain as impressive today as they were on day one. The word “agenda” represents a lifestyle of precision and structure, where every moment is thoughtfully planned, and every journey aboard is purposeful and efficient.

Each stateroom aboard Agenda 55 has its own unique name, design, and personality, reflecting the yacht’s attention to detail and commitment to guest comfort. Everything on this catamaran is carefully arranged to elevate your experience, offering luxury, convenience, and seamless service from start to finish.

Agenda 55 isn’t just a vessel; it’s a symbol of organized elegance, always moving forward with intention and grace. Embark on a journey where every detail is accounted for, and every moment is unforgettable.

crew.name: Vedran Šubić
crew.bio:
Biography:
I’m a dedicated yacht captain from Croatia with over 10 years of experience on the water. My passion for the sea led me to earn my Yachtmaster certification, and I’ve had the privilege of navigating some of the most beautiful waters from the Mediterranean to the Caribbean. I’m known for my leadership, attention to detail, and commitment to providing a safe and unforgettable experience for every guest. I strive to make every voyage not just a journey, but an adventure to remember.

Skills/Expertise/Languages:
Certified Yachtmaster with extensive experience in navigation and operations
Over 30.000 nautical miles sailed
Deep knowledge of Mediterranean, Caribbean, and Atlantic cruising grounds
Skilled in yacht maintenance, repair, and troubleshooting onboard systems
First Aid & CPR certified
Fluent in English & German, and Croatian as a native language

Personal Interests:
Passionate about exploring uncharted territories, often seeking out hidden bays and secluded islands. When o duty, I enjoy photography, diving, and learning new skills to further enhance my expertise. These hobbies not only enrich my personal life but also bring added value to guests seeking unique experiences.

Why Vedran loves his Job:
Yachting is more than a job for me; it’s a way of life. I take pride in creating unforgettable experiences for my clients, from guiding them to the best destinations to ensuring their comfort and safety at every step. The sea constantly inspires me, and I am privileged to share this passion with others

crew.name: Katarina Matić
crew.bio:
Short Biography:
I am a reliable and proactive professional with experience as a yacht stewardess, fitness coach, and swimming coach. My organizational skills and positive attitude help me adapt to new challenges and provide excellent service.

Skills & Expertise:
Customer service and organization
Meal preparation and food management
Following specific guest preference lists with attention to cultural diversity
Safety procedures (D2 STCW, Food & Hygiene Level 2)
Fitness and wellness programs
Fluent in English and Croatian

Personal Interests:
I love exploring healthy lifestyles, discovering new cuisines, and creating active experiences for guests.

Why I’m Interested in the Job:
I enjoy working with people, providing great service, and creating memorable experiences. I value cultural diversity and prioritize following guest preferences while maintaining a “safety first” approach. This role fits my skills and passion for hospitality and travel.
